title: oxalis ornithopus
intro: Oxalis ornithopus, also known as the creeping oxalis or purple wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the oxalis genus. The medicinal properties of Oxalis ornithopus include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can help to soothe and protect the body from damage. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to support urinary health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular remedy for kidney stones and other urinary issues. Oxalis ornithopus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a more comprehensive range of health benefits.
